about.title: About InaBCRU
about.description: InaBCRU is an organization dedicated to the preservation of bats in Indonesia through research, education, conservation and collaboration with various parties.
about.subtitle: Building a network of researchers, observers and practitioners of bat conservation in Indonesia

visionMission.title: Vision & Mission
visionMission.subtitle: Our mission for bat conservation in Indonesia

vision.title: Vision
vision.description: To become the premier platform in Indonesia for bat research and conservation that contributes to the balance and harmony of human life and the environment.

mission.title: Mission
items: Build close, sustainable, and organized networks of collaboration among researchers, observers, and practitioners of bat conservation in Indonesia.
Conduct systematic and scientific research, study, and development of bat science to support its preservation.
Implement wise bat and habitat conservation to maintain sustainability and biodiversity.
Build a comprehensive database of Indonesian bats.
Disseminate information on bat research and conservation efforts to the wider public.
Develop human resource capacity and provide policy advocacy recommendations related to bats and their habitats.
